name: Dotmatics
description: Blog posts from Dotmatics covering scientific informatics, ELN, LIMS, drug discovery, and R&D data management.

blogs.title: Announcing Dotmatics ELN & Data Discovery Platform 7.1
blogs.author: Andrew Lebeau
blogs.description: Version 7.1 of the Dotmatics ELN & Data Discovery Platform introduces major UI/UX enhancements, improved workflows for biologics and formulations research, and strengthened backend API and Apache NiFi connectivity for data exchange across laboratory instruments and analytical applications.
